mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.nickname as user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar, ru.nickname as reply_user_name FROM product_comment c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN sys_user ru ON c.reply_user_id = ru.id WHERE c.product_id = #{productId} AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT c.*, u.nickname as user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar, p.name as product_name, ru.nickname as reply_user_name FROM product_comment c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN product p ON c.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN sys_user ru ON c.reply_user_id = ru.id
AND (c.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
